rulings.Case Title: TERESA MASSIMO VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Issuance For Preliminary Injunction And Order To Show Cause
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 20, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF TERESA MASSIMO's Motion For Issuance For Preliminary Injunction And Order To Show Cause Off Calendar. Moving Party failed to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and the Court's Order. = (501)

rulings.Case Title: LITTON LOAN SERVICING LP VS. LUCY NULOC BOC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Vacate Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 20, 2012, line 9. DEFENDANT KUEN YEE TAN's Motion to Vacate Judgment GRANTED, (SUBJECT TO OPPOSITION): 1) MOVING PARTY NEVER SERVED, 2) JUDGMENT ENTERED PER STIPULATION WITH FORMER OWNER, NOT TENANT, and 3) WRIT NAMES "ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS". = (501)
